name: Sony 120GB G Series XQD Memory Card
description: Designed for professional photographers and videographers, the 120GB G Series XQD Memory Card from Sony is made to excel in high-end DSLRs, including models from Nikon and Sony, and offers a storage capacity of up to 120GB.

features.Key Features:: 120GB Storage Capacity | PCIe 2.0 Interface | Max. Read Speed: 440 MB/s | Max. Write Speed: 400 MB/s | Record 4K Video & Raw Photo Bursts | Durable Shell Structure | Shock / X-Ray Proof | Can Withstand Extreme Temperatures | Resistant to UV Light, Static, and Drops | Downloadable File Rescue Software
